author: tmiychao
content:
Share your preliminary updates in this thread. Make sure to also post it to [github](https://github.com/eth-protocol-fellows/cohort-seven/blob/main/development-updates.md). This is just an initial opportunity to get ready for the fellowship, share your plans and practice writing your updates. 
Do not use LLMs to generate your updates but communicate your actual thoughts and plans please, slop updates are not accepted in the repo.

author: xrs_01
content:
Thank you Mario. Gm.

I'll be working on a holistic research approach to Lean Execution. I'm currently working on a research paper to serve as a guideline to myself. I have a number of ideas I'm currently doing preliminary research for, but I plan on practically grounding any research in specifications and actual proof-of-concepts later down the line. I'd also like to contribute to the Lean Ethereum development space in ways outside of my own ideas.

What I'm working on roughly falls into the sub-topics of SNARKs, zkEVMs, sharding, and statelessness.

<https://docs.fileverse.io/d/020011100018#k=8xrRiRcxDIewJk6a5D1sKgPAOrwnot0ONS683iTxzGs8>
